ab: mahica tu, u canan ku cakayen isu?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: a micakay tu cacay a kupu kaku.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: mahica tu, u canan ku cakayen isu?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: micakay tu cacay a tupel kaku.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: amicakay tu kupu kaku, izaw kina pacakay namu haw?
ch: B+:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: B: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: izaw, pina ku kaydihan isu micakay?
en: A: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: izaw kunipacakay namu tu da’dac haw?
en: B: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: nayi’, caay pacakay tu da’dac kami.
en: A: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: micakay kaku tu belac.
en: B: I want to buy rice.

ab: pina a tabu kuni picakay isu?
en: A: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: papelien kaku tu tuluay a tabu.
en: B: Give me a three pack.

ab: a micakay tu tubah kaku.
en: B: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: mapacakay tu amin ku tubah.
en: A: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: micakay tu tusaay a silasumi.
en: B: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: cacay tu ku liwan niyam.
en: A: We only have one bottle left.

ab: padaduen kaku micakay tu ti’kuk.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: pina a daduy ku picakay isu?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: pina a daduy kuni picakay isu tu ti’kuk?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: tusaan a daduy kuni picakay aku.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: tusaen a balud ku kenaw picakay aku.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: tulu tu a balud ku liwan, hamin han i!
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: pinaan ku aca nina belac?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: tusa a lasubu ku cacay a tabu.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: pulung han tusa bataan izaw ku cacay a kalisiw, kapah tu tusa han a bataan.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: kukay.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: siwa izaw ku lima a kalisiw ku itiniay.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: a micakay henay kaku, micunus tu cacay a lasubu nu kalisiw.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: hamin lima a lasubu izaw ku cacay a bataan ku kalisiw.
en: A:All $510.

ab: lima a lasubu han ku aca i takuwan haw?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: tada matekes kuyni, taneng selepen tu atudi haw?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: la’cus, u maselepay tu kuyni.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: uyni a piyang ku han aku.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: tulu a bataan ku aca kina piyang, maydih henay tu zumaay a tuud haw?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
